products.title: Weber Replacement Hose & Regulator - 8511
products.body_html:
Replacement hose and regulator to fit Weber gas barbecues in the Q 200/2000(N), Spirit, Genesis, Summit® and SLATE 56/71/76cm series.

Our large gas barbecues are designed to run off Patio gas or Leisure gas canisters filled with butane gas. These canisters are typically green in colour and can be purchased from your local Calor gas centre, garden centre or petrol station. Sizes of these canisters range from 5kg-13kg.

We do not recommend modifying the BBQ as this will void the warranty, as we cannot guarantee user safety when using third party products.

Please double check the specifications and fits information to ensure that you’re choosing the best part for your barbecue.

Weber code:91470

products.title: Weber Griddle Chopper
products.body_html:
Slice, dice, chop and scrape with the stainless-steel griddle chopper. Its heavy-duty blade stands up to the toughest griddling tasks like breaking up minced meat, dicing vegetables, mixing scrambled eggs and shifting foods around the griddle. Plus, you can use it for dividing ingredients while baking and food prepping or for frosting cakes.

• Sturdy, stainless-steel blade
• Generously sized handle for comfort and control
• Use outdoors for griddling
• Use indoors for food prep tasks
• Dishwasher-safe

products.title: Weber Spirit EPX-435R - STEALTH
products.body_html:
Barbecue food that tastes better than ever on the reinvented 4-burner Spirit® EPX-435R Smart Gas Barbecue Stealth® Edition with Sear Zone, Wi-Fi®-enabled digital thermometer, side burner and included rotisserie accessory. The Stealth® Edition features a sleek, all-black exterior, fierce red accents and black stainless-steel details. Never undercook or overcook your food again with the Wi-Fi®-enabled digital thermometer, which is supplied with one wired food probe. Pair it with the Weber Connect® app to monitor remotely and receive alerts on your smartphone when the barbecue is preheated and when your food is ready to flip. Create bold, flavourful sear marks on meat, fish and vegetables with two red Boost burner knobs that unleash 40% more power in the Sear Zone. Ignite each individual burner easily with one hand with Snap-Jet Ignition and control the heat precisely with a full range of temperatures from high to low and everything in between. Roast a whole chicken, prime rib or leg of lamb evenly while locking in juices with the included rotisserie accessory. Make the most of your space by adding a variety of Weber Works accessories that drop into the right-hand side table or snap onto both side rails.* Heavy-duty, porcelain-enamelled cast-iron cooking grates flip over to fit Weber Crafted® Gourmet BBQ System (GBS) grillware, giving you ultimate cooking versatility to transform your barbecue with a griddle, pizza stone, cross-hatch sear grate and more.*

*Weber Crafted® grillware, Weber Works accessories and cooking accessories sold separately.

products.title: Weber Genesis GBS E-315 Black
products.body_html:
The 3-burner, porcelain-enamel Genesis E-315 delivers legendary Weber quality, performance and durability in a barbecue you can rely on to make outdoor cooking for family and friends easy and enjoyable. The PureBlu burner system sets this barbecue apart from the pack – featuring unique, tapered burner tubes that generate consistent pressure and flames, and deliver even heat across the barbecuing surface. Flames are directed above the raised gas ports, while food debris falls below, minimising clogging and ensuring the barbecue lights every time.

  • PureBlu burners distribute even heat across the entire cooking grate
  • Porcelain-enamelled, cast-iron cooking grates retain heat for searing
  • Flavorizer Bars vaporise juices, boosting barbecued flavour
  • Grease Management System with pull out grease tray
  • WEBER CRAFTED cooking grates expand barbecuing techniques

Part Number: #1500387

Barbecue Specifications

  • Main burners: kW11.4
  • Dimensions - Lid Open (centimetres)160.00cm H x 147.00cm W x 77.50cm D
  • Dimensions - Lid Closed (centimetres)122.00cm H x 147.00cm W x 68.50cm D
  • Primary cooking area3,310 cm²
  • Warming rack area826 cm²
  • Total cooking area4,136 cm²

Warranty Information

  • Cooking box: 12 years, no rust-through/burn-through (2 years paint, excluding fading or discolouration)
  • Lid assembly: 12 years, no rust-through/burn-through (2 years paint, excluding fading or discolouration)
  • Stainless steel burner tubes: 10 years, no rust through/burn through
  • Stainless steel cooking grates: 10 years, no rust through/burn through
  • Stainless steel FLAVORIZER bars: 10 years, no rust through/burn through
  • Porcelain-enamelled, cast-iron cooking grates: 10 years, no rust through/burn through
  • WEBER CONNECT components: 3 years
  • All remaining parts: 5 years

products.title: Weber Master-Touch GBS E-5750 Charcoal BBQ 57cm - Burnt Orange
products.body_html:
This Special Edition Burnt Orange charcoal grill is available in limited numbers and exclusively in Weber Stores. A real highlight for collectors and the perfect gift for true Weber lovers.

The ritual of charcoal grilling meets the innovative features, convenience, and overall wow factor of the Master-Touch charcoal grill. The Gourmet BBQ System cooking grate allows you to cook breakfast, simmer chili, and prepare a perfectly grilled pizza. With improved bowl venting, you can now grill and smoke with one grill; and features such as the Tuck-Away lid holder and One-Touch cleaning system bring convenience to charcoal grilling and everyday life.

products.title: Weber Slate 71cm Premium Griddle BBQ - Black
products.body_html:
Have more fun griddling on the game-changing Weber® Slate® GP 71cm Premium griddle. Its stick-resistant, porcelain-enamelled cooktop is ready to cook on right out of the box so you can create juicy smashed burgers, flavourful stir-fries, beautifully seared seafood, vegetables and more. This griddle quickly heats up to more than 260°C and provides even heat across the surface. Wind guards prevent the burners from blowing out, and the cooktop is set close to the burners to ensure a steady temperature. Three independently controlled burners allow for multi-zone heat, so you can cook perfect pancakes on low while crisping up bacon on high all on the same cooktop. The surface is safe for metal tools, so you can flip, press and scrape without worry. Keep your griddle gear near with a variety of accessories that drop into the Weber Works side table (right) or snap onto Weber Works side rails. The left side table folds down to save space when you’re done.

• Even, edge-to-edge heat for consistent cooking across the griddle
• Heats up to more than 260°C for high heat searing and crispy edges
• Porcelain-enamelled cooktop is ready right out of the box
• Stick-resistant surface is easy to cook on and is safe for metal tools
• Wind guards protect burners and ensure a steady temperature
• Precision control knobs adjust heat smoothly and gradually
• 3 independently controlled burners allow for multi-zone cooking
• Weber Works side table (right) fits drop in accessories
• Weber Works side rails fit snap on accessories
• Fold-down side table (left) for easier storage in tight spaces
• Sleek, hinged hard cover protects cooktop from the elements
• Extra-large grease drip pan makes cleaning up easy
• 2 tool hooks keep spatulas and scrapers handy
• 2 heavy-duty wheels for easy movement on any surface
• Mid-shelf provides convenient added storage
• 5-year limited warranty

products.title: Magnolia soulangeana 50-60 CM C4.5
products.body_html:
Magnolia soulangeana is a stunning magnolia with large pinky-red blossoms with light pink tips.
This magnolia would make a real splash of colour in any garden. They are perfect for large planters as they love acid soil.

Why we love it
- Fantastic show of flowers in spring
- Magnolia are great for large planters or pots.
- Magnolias are very hardy and can withstand even the coldest of Irish winters.

What to know
- Flowering time: April - May
- Flower colour: red-pink with some white
- Plant in a sunny location
- Requires acid soil. Be sure to purchase compost and food with this plant.
- Eventual height: 2.5m x 1.5m
- Actual height now: 50-60cm
- Pot size: 4.5 Litre

products.title: Magnolia mix 40-50 CM C3.5

products.title: Magnolia Sunsation 10LT
products.body_html:
Magnolia stellata
star magnolia

Position: full sun
Soil: any moist, well-drained soil
Rate of growth: slow-growing
Flowering period: March to April
Hardiness: fully hardy

A popular, compact, bushy shrub or small tree with mid-green leaves and silky buds which open up to large, pure white, star-shaped flowers, sometimes faintly flushed pink. The flowers are lightly scented, and open very early, before the leaves, eventually covering the shrub for several weeks. This is one of the best magnolias for a small garden.

Garden care: Plant in a sheltered spot, away from strong winds. Requires minimal pruning. Remove any broken, diseased or crossing branches in midsummer. Plant in a sheltered spot, adding plenty of peat to the planting hole. Mulch in spring with manure and leaf mould, especially on dry soils.

Actual plant size: 70cm
Pot size: 5ltr
tags: This Week's Looking Good Plant List

products.title: Golden Privet Hedging | Ligustrum ovalifolium Aureum- 2 Litre 30-40cm
products.body_html:
Golden Privet. This vigorous, oval leaf golden privet makes a crisp, pollution-tolerant hedge for an urban or surburban site. The small, oval, bright gold leaves provide dense cover, and clusters of white flowers appear in July and August followed by shiny, spherical, black fruit. Thriving in sun or shade, the lustrous, dark green foliage provides an evergreen backdrop for ornamental and feature plants. If grown as a hedge and kept pruned, it is unlikely to flower.

Garden care:
Plants grown as free-standing specimens require minimal pruning where necessary remove any misplaced or diseased branches in late-winter or early spring. Trim hedging plants twice yearly, in May and August. After pruning apply a generous 5-7cm (2-3in) mulch of well-rotted compost or manure around the base of the plant.

What to know
- Position: Full sun or partial shade
- Soil: Any well-drained soil
- Rate of growth: Fast-growing
- Flowering period: July and August
- Hardiness: Fully hardy
- Eventual Height:- 60cm
